description.ko: 유체 역학과 기하학적 빛의 구조를 통해 시각화된 소리의 보이지 않는 힘.
description.en: The invisible power of sound made visible through fluid dynamics and geometric light structures.

prompt: A cinematic high-tech visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Orchestral Singularity.' A central floating core of liquid chrome vibrates violently, generating complex 3D holographic rings that manifest as #4169E1 royal blue waves and #FF4500 electric orange ripples. As the sound frequency peaks, the air crystallizes into #32CD32 green geometric particles and #FFD700 gold light trails. Dark studio void background, hyper-realistic ray tracing, capturing the visual consonance of a symphony rendered in physical light and motion. 8k resolution, extreme detail.
